summary: Block 243 Valuation Visibility Overhaul - All 13 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend UI verified: 'Value This' button appears on records with discogs_id but no value, clicking opens ValuationAssistantModal in focus mode, saving value instantly updates the RecordCard price badge (no refresh needed), Profile page shows '⚠️ N records pending valuation' link when pending_count > 0.

issues: TreasuryHeader only displays when collection total_value > 0. Without any valued records, the pending valuation button won't appear in TreasuryHeader (but works correctly in the Dream List tab header and Profile page).

critical_code_review_comments: valuation.py lines 352-385: POST /api/valuation/community-value/{discogs_id} correctly saves valuations, updates existing (no duplicates), and rejects value <= 0
valuation.py lines 388-397: GET /api/valuation/community-average/{discogs_id} returns average_value and contribution_count as expected
valuation.py lines 182-222: _recalculate_dream_value() correctly calculates pending_count as total_count - valued_count
ValuationAssistantModal.js: Full rewrite with focusItem prop for single-record mode. Shows 'Hive Average: $XX.XX' when community data exists
CollectionPage.js lines 282-302: handleValueThis() opens modal with focus item, handleValuationUpdate() instantly updates valueMap for UI refresh
CollectionPage.js lines 982-996: RecordCard shows 'Value This' button when value=0/null AND record has discogs_id
ProfilePage.js lines 593-608: Dream Value section shows pending link with AlertTriangle icon when pending_count > 0 for own profile
CollectionPage.js lines 139-148: TreasuryHeader shows pending button under Dream Value when dreamPendingCount > 0
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up: 1 record with discogs_id 888888, 1 dream list item with discogs_id 777777
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 243 Valuation Visibility fully verified. Backend endpoints community-value and community-average work correctly. Frontend 'Value This' button appears on records with discogs_id but no value, opens ValuationAssistantModal in focus mode, and saving immediately updates the price badge (no page refresh). Profile page pending link works. TreasuryHeader pending button only shows when collection has valued items (total_value > 0).

backend_community_average.details: GET /api/valuation/community-average/{discogs_id} returns average_value and contribution_count (public endpoint)

backend_community_value_save.details: POST /api/valuation/community-value/{discogs_id} saves valuation and returns new average

backend_community_value_no_duplicates.details: Same user updating value replaces existing contribution (no duplicates)

frontend_value_this_button.details: 'Value This' button appears on RecordCards when value=0/null and record has discogs_id

frontend_valuation_modal_focus_mode.details: Clicking 'Value This' opens ValuationAssistantModal with focus-item-card visible

frontend_hive_average_display.details: Focus mode shows 'Hive Average: $XX.XX' when community data exists, 'No community data yet' otherwise

frontend_instant_price_update.details: After saving value, price badge immediately updates from 'Value This' to '$XX' without page refresh

frontend_profile_pending_link.details: Profile page shows '⚠️ N records pending valuation' link when pending_count > 0 for own profile

frontend_treasury_pending_btn.details: TreasuryHeader with pending button only displays when collection has valued items (total_value > 0). Design decision, not a bug.

mocked_api_note: No APIs mocked for this test
